key_risks: Dovish FOMC surprise sparks growth/tech rally that lags this defensive mix
Oil reversal on demand disappointment hurts energy overweight
Hot CPI/PPI prints spike yields and pressure all equity sectors
Healthcare drug-pricing policy headlines weigh on XLV

portfolio.rationale: Defensive sector with positive momentum amid sticky inflation and weak sentiment; outperformed recently.
Quality dividend tilt provides defense given elevated VIX, weak consumer confidence, and rich SPX valuation at 25.9x.
FY27 $1.5T defense budget request supports orders; relatively insulated from consumer weakness.
WTI at $90, EIA forecasts inventory drawdown of 2.6mbpd, strong momentum and inflation hedge.
Dry powder ahead of June FOMC and CPI; cushions against equity drawdown with VIX at 21.5.

portfolio_rationale: Stagflation tilt: hot CPI/PPI, weak sentiment, 1.6% GDP, rich SPX valuation argue for defensive sectors (healthcare, dividend), real-asset cyclical (energy), policy-backed defense, and short duration cash ahead of FOMC.
rationale_summary: Defensive-cyclical barbell to navigate sticky inflation, slowing growth, rich valuations, and FOMC catalyst within scoring window.
